value_chain_position: FAA-approved Parts Manufacturer Approval (PMA) replacement parts distributor and niche aerospace electronics manufacturer; operates as a structural cost-reduction toll on airline and defense MRO spend.
relative_comps: HEICO is the closest thing to a moat-compounding disruptor in aerospace MRO: its PMA parts are FAA-certified substitutes for OEM parts at 30-40% discounts, structurally eroding the aftermarket toll that GE/RTX/Safran charge. Revenue CAGR of 27% (3y) driven by acquisition cadence and organic pricing. FCF margin 19% and clean balance sheet distinguish it from TransDigm (TDG), its closest comparable, which carries 7-8x EBITDA leverage. Space exposure is modest (niche avionics for satellites) but present. The business model is genuinely disruptive to legacy OEM aftermarket pricing power.
